message:
feat: implement Environment Variables editor with split-pane interface and validation

Delivers medium complexity environment variable editor following TDD:

Split-Pane Editor Interface:
- Left panel: textarea component for multi-line environment variable editing
- Right panel: help documentation with format examples and real-time validation
- Full-screen overlay when editing environment variables
- Professional lipgloss styling with borders and proper layout

Text Editor Features:
- Use bubbles textarea.Model for professional text editing experience
- Multi-line editing with cursor, selection, scrolling
- Parse format: VARIABLE_NAME (pass-through) or VARIABLE_NAME=value (fixed)
- Support comments with # prefix
- Real-time parsing and validation feedback

Environment Variables Section:
- Added as 4th section: Environment Variables
- env-editor field type opens split-pane interface
- Shows variable count summary when not editing
- Press Enter on field to open full-screen editor

Real-Time Validation:
- Parse environment variables as user types
- Count pass-through vs fixed-value variables
- Validate syntax and show errors
- Display variable statistics in help panel

Navigation Integration:
- Enter on env-editor field opens split-pane editor
- Full textarea editing capabilities with proper key handling
- Enter saves changes and returns to main settings
- Esc cancels and returns to main settings

Expected Workflow:
1. Navigate to Environment Variables section
2. Press Enter to open split-pane editor
3. Edit variables in left panel with full text editing
4. See real-time help and validation in right panel
5. Press Enter to save and return to main settings

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
